message:
test(cli,lint): coverage boost — mail, personas, handoff helpers + lint branches

CLI: looksLikeAgentName (valid/invalid edge cases), parseMessageIDs
(empty/valid/invalid), renderTempBar (all 4 temperature ranges + boundaries),
renderTags (empty/single/multiple), valueOrDefault, formatHandoffMarkdown
(minimal/full/no-optional-sections). 22 new tests covering mail.go, personas.go,
handoff.go pure functions.

Lint: LintWithRedaction with configured redactor (42.9% → 100%), getConfigInt
all type branches (50% → 100%), oversized prompt bytes/tokens thresholds.
Lint overall: 89.9% → 96.3%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
